query:
SELECT 
  readinessBucket,
  COUNT(*) AS projectCount,
  SUM(hotCount) AS hotProjects,
  SUM(warmCount) AS warmProjects
FROM (
  SELECT 
    p.id, p.priority,
    CASE WHEN p.priority = 'hot' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hotCount,
    CASE WHEN p.priority = 'warm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS warmCount,
    CASE 
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN 'A — Already send_ready'
      WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN 'B — Named, needs email only'
      WHEN COUNT(c.id) > 0 THEN 'C — LLM-inferred, needs name+email'
      ELSE 'D — No contacts at all'
    END AS readinessBucket
  FROM projects p
  LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
  WHERE p.createdAt >= '2026-05-12 00:00:00'
    AND p.suppressed = 0
    AND p.priority IN ('hot', 'warm')
  GROUP BY p.id
) sub
GROUP BY readinessBucket
ORDER BY readinessBucket;
